name: cv-processor
description: This library process user friendly cv files in json, toml and yaml/yml format and delivers typescript model, which we can use for any purpose like redering UI, generate stylish cv docx etc. It supports multi language.

scripts.release:check:internal: git diff-index --quiet HEAD -- && echo "✅ Success: You have no local changes." || (echo "❌ Error: You have uncommitted changes. Commit your source code first!" && exit 1)
scripts.release:build:internal: pnpm run release:check:internal && tsup CVProcessor/index.ts --out-dir release --format cjs,esm --dts --minify --clean && echo "✅ Success: Build done. ⚙️ "
scripts.release:patch: pnpm run release:build:internal && pnpm version patch --no-git-tag-version && echo "✅ Patch Version updated. 🛠️" && git add release/ package.json && git commit -m "chore: PATCH released" && echo "✅ Success: The PATCH released successfully. Ready to push. 🔥 🚀"
scripts.release:minor: pnpm run release:build:internal && pnpm version minor --no-git-tag-version && echo "✅ Minor Version updated. 🛠️" && git add release/ package.json && git commit -m "chore: MINOR Version released" && echo "✅ Success: The MINOR version released successfully. Ready to push. 💥 🚀"

author: Shamil Khan
